error.description_length: Description must be 256 characters or fewer

error.too_many_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
error.account_not_activated: Your account has not been activated yet. Please contact the site owner.
error.not_agent_user: Only delivery agents have assigned agents
error.session_lacks_key: Cannot create invite: your session has no data key — log in again
error.username_mismatch: Username does not match. Please type the exact username to confirm deletion.
error.listing_name_mismatch: Listing name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm.
error.listing_name_mismatch_delete: Listing name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm deletion.
error.slug_in_use: Slug is already in use by another listing
error.encryption_error: Encryption error — check that DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY is configured
error.no_payment_to_refund: This attendee has no payment to refund.
error.no_attendees_to_refund: No attendees have payments to refund.
error.refund_failed: Refund failed. The payment may have already been refunded.
error.refund_not_recorded: Refund processed at the provider, but it could not be recorded in the ledger. A manual adjustment is needed — do not re-refund.
error.already_refunded: This attendee has already been refunded.
error.attendee_name_mismatch_delete: Attendee name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm deletion.
error.attendee_name_mismatch_refund: Attendee name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm refund.
error.attendee_name_mismatch: Attendee name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm.
error.attendee_no_incomplete_payment: Attendee does not have an incomplete payment
error.listing_name_mismatch_refund: Listing name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm.
error.group_name_mismatch: Group name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm deletion.
error.holiday_name_mismatch: Holiday name does not match. Please type the exact name to confirm deletion.
error.end_date_before_start: End date must be on or after the start date
error.package_incompatible_listing: Packages cannot contain listings with customisable days or pay-what-you-want pricing. Remove those listings before marking this group as a package.
error.package_member_no_children: a package member cannot require children
error.hidden_package_has_bookings: This hidden package has tickets already sold against it. Deleting it or turning off its package status would reveal the member listings it hid on those existing tickets. Reveal the members first (uncheck "hide member listings") if you really mean to expose them.
error.new_password_min: New password must be at least 8 characters
error.stripe_demo_mode: Cannot configure Stripe in demo mode
error.stripe_key_format: Invalid Stripe key format. Keys must start with sk_test_ (test mode) or sk_live_ (live mode).
error.stripe_webhook_failed: Failed to set up Stripe webhook: {error}
error.square_demo_mode: Cannot configure Square in demo mode
error.booking_fee_range: Booking fee must be a number between 0 and 10
error.email_format: Invalid email format. Please use format: name@domain.com
error.terms_length: Terms must be {max} characters or fewer (currently {current})
error.from_address_format: Invalid from-address format. Please use format: name@domain.com
error.template_too_long: Template {name} exceeds maximum length of {max} characters
error.confirm_phrase_mismatch: Confirmation phrase does not match. Please type the exact phrase to confirm reset.
error.apple_signing_cert_invalid: Signing certificate is not a valid PEM certificate
error.apple_signing_key_invalid: Signing private key is not a valid PEM private key
error.apple_wwdr_cert_invalid: WWDR certificate is not a valid PEM certificate
error.google_service_key_required: Service account private key is required
error.google_service_key_invalid: Service account private key is not a valid PEM private key
error.invite_invalid: This invite link is invalid or has already been used.
success.refund_partial: {succeeded} refund(s) succeeded, {failed} failed. {remaining} remaining — submit again to continue.
success.refund_partial_done: {succeeded} refund(s) succeeded, {failed} failed. Some payments may have already been refunded.
success.refund_batch: {count} attendee(s) refunded. {remaining} remaining — submit again to continue.
success.payment_status_current: Payment status is up to date

success.stripe_updated: Stripe key updated and webhook configured successfully
success.square_webhook_updated: Square webhook signature key updated successfully
success.custom_domain_save_failed: Custom domain saved but validation failed: {error}
